title: xsd:gYear format issue
description:
In 616e55a
In addition to
#125
there is another bug with xsd:gYear datatype.
See http://linked.opendata.cz/resource/domain/election-to-chamber-of-deputies-czech-republic/dataset/result-of-political-parties-elections-nuts/2006/21/CZ041
What was loaded was "2006"^^xsd:gYear
the "year" value as shown in fct is "2006-01-01 00:00:00"^^xsd:date
When I click on JSON in fct, what I get is "2006+01:00"
When I execute

prefix xsd:     <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
prefix ecdcz:   <http://linked.opendata.cz/ontology/domain/election-to-chamber-of-deputies-czech-republic/>
SELECT *
WHERE {
       ?uri ecdcz:refPeriod ?year
      }
LIMIT 1

on http://linked.opendata.cz/sparql, I get "2006+01:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#gYear>
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE election_results (id INT PRIMARY KEY, refPeriod YEAR, party_name VARCHAR(255), votes INT);
INSERT INTO election_results (id, refPeriod, party_name, votes) VALUES (1, 2006, 'Party A', 1500);
INSERT INTO election_results (id, refPeriod, party_name, votes) VALUES (2, 2007, 'Party B', 2000);
SELECT id, CONCAT(refPeriod, '-01-01') AS refPeriod, party_name FROM election_results WHERE refPeriod = 2006;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM election_results WHERE votes IS NULL OR votes < 0;
key_bug_features: xsd:gYear datatype returning incorrect date format
